notes: I did not test multiplayer - but everything else including online seems to be 100% - a full screen improvement on the original Age of Titans that I have running on the same computer  under wine. Performance was 100% at maximum grahics settings. I found that the pointer took me to the wrong area of the map when I clicked in one game, but this happened now and then in the original Age of Titans under wine as well so I exited and went back in and it was fine.
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: if you are lucky it starts directly in fullscreen, but most likely it will be a window in the upper left corner (even if fullscreen in settings is enabled) If it does its not useable. A workaround is in between the small time when the launcher disappears and befor the window appears you need to click the new appearing task in the taskline (this will somehow force the window to go into correct screen settings)

notes:

title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: Added my screen resolution to launch options which is "xres=1920 yres=1080" and select bypass launcher to run it. Without this launch option it immediately stops running at the beginning. Also turned V-sync off for better performance.
